items.name_cn:
🆕 M82206
Exclusive edition of the 'Zippy Wallet' for the 'Gradient' collection this season. Featuring a high-end gradient on soft, embossed Monogram Unplant leather in summer tones. A signature wallet characterized by a slender silhouette. A zip opening with a cleverly designed interior featuring multiple card slots, pockets, and compartments.
Size: 19.5 10.5 2.5

items.name_cn:
🆕 M82348
A "Portefeuille Victorine" for the "Gradient" collection. Reinterpreted with a beautiful gradient in Monogram Unplant leather featuring summer tones. Despite its compact size, it features multiple pockets and 6 card slots, making the surprisingly large interior a charm. A gold button with the "Louis Vuitton" signature on the decorative flap adds a touch of color.
Dimensions: 12 9.5 1.5

🆕 M82392
Made of Monogram Unplant leather featuring a stamped Monogram pattern, this "Portomone Rozari" is a small wallet with a circular flap decorated with a button snap. The interior features a flat pocket, a zipper coin pocket, and 2 card slots.
Size:11 8 2.5

🆕 M83500
Single zipper wallet series Zippy coin Perth wallet. Gpi Coin Perth coordinated with the Monoglam theme of the leather goods collection this season. Special coating creates a bold, metallic effect on cotton and Lurex jacquard canvas. Space-efficient compact design. Secure full-zip closure. Various pockets and card slots.

items.name_cn:
🆕 M83505
A "Zippy Wallet" with embossed and printed Monogram pattern on a fluffy lambskin. Cut in feminine tones and finished with a gold zipper. Multiple compartments, pockets, and card slots to hold essentials like bills and coins, making it a functional wallet for daily use.
Size: 19.5 x 10.5 x 2.5 cm

items.name_en: New Mini Essential Boston Bag
items.name_cn:
New Mini Essential Boston Bag
A fresh take on a classic silhouette. This Boston bag, paying homage to MCM's rooted travel philosophy, evokes the spirit of a weekend travel bag with clean lines and a convenient extended zipper for easy opening. Exquisitely crafted with meticulous attention to detail, the top handle is hand-wrapped, stitched, and edge-painted. Size: 18x10x8cm

items.name_en: New Mini Shoulder Bag is Here
items.name_cn:
New Mini Shoulder Bag is Here
A new member has been added to the Kelly family. I was instantly obsessed with the online photos, and the first time I saw the real thing, it felt like an enlarged version of the Kelly To Go. The bottom length is similar to the Kelly 28. The bag's thickness is about the same as the second generation, and the capacity is excellent. The shoulder strap is detachable but not adjustable in length. However, it is easy to carry regardless of height. Detach the strap to turn it into a clutch with a bit of a Kelly Cut vibe, very commanding. In short, the look and practicality are both on point, highly recommended. 27.5✕15✕5
